items.title: Dow Jones And U.S. Index Outlook: Hawkish NFP Sends Stocks Lower
items.description: Stock benchmarks give up their early gains as traders price out cuts after the strong non-farm payrolls report.

items.title: 3 Warning Signs The Stock Market Is Overdue For A Sharp Correction
items.description: The bullish narrative may be masking deeper structural cracks beneath the surface. Read here for a deeper macroeconomic analysis.

items.title: Private Sector Ramps Up Hiring. Job Losses Mount At Federal And State Governments
items.description: The federal government shed another 34,000 jobs in January as previously departed employees whose separation packages expired at yearend came off the payrolls.

items.title: Employment Report: 130K Jobs Added In January, Higher Than Expected
items.description: The latest employment report showed that 130,000 jobs were added in January, up from December's 48,000 addition.

items.title: WCLD Down 30% as Growth Investors Finally Get Cold Feet About AI Spend
items.description: Cloud computing stocks are trading like they’ve hit a wall. WisdomTree Cloud Computing Fund (NASDAQ:WCLD) dropped 30.5% over the past year to $28.60, a stark reversal from the sector’s pandemic-era dominance. This divergence from the S&P 500 (NYSEARCA:SPY)’s 14.4% gain reflects investor skepticism about whether emerging cloud software companies can maintain their business models as ... WCLD Down 30% as Growth Investors Finally Get Cold Feet About AI Spend
